name: Tofu Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Picante sauce of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Make or buy a regular pie crust and bake it at 375°F for about 10 minutes, or until starting to turn golden brown.
2. Remove the pie crust from the oven.
3. In a food processor or blender, whir together the drained tofu block, eggs, milk, spices (oregano and garlic powder).
4. Stir in half of the grated cheese.
5. Add the picante sauce (do not whirl) and broccoli (do not whirl). You can add additional ingredients to make this even hotter if desired; use your imagination. Meat such as chicken could also be added.
6. Fold all these ingredients into the tofu-egg-cheese mixture and place in the prepared pie crust.
7. Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
8. Bake at 375°F for about 35 to 40 minutes, or until a fork inserted in the center comes out clean. The quiche will cut more easily after it has cooled.
9. The predominant flavor will be from the picante sauce, with minimal taste of tofu or other ingredients. You'll know you're getting low-calorie nourishment from the beans and can feel smug around your friends.
